summary: Add a truthiness guard to prevent empty image lists from being forwarded to the diffusion payload.
Either implement gating with the orphaned requires_multimodal_data parameter or drop it to prevent confusion.
Attach actual metric values (PSNR, SSIM, CLIP score, COT similarity) to confirm no silent quality regression in the e2e test.
Update the helper docstring to reflect that the return can be None, matching the production docstring.
Add assertions on height and width to ensure companion-specific data does not leak into the diffusion request payload.
